steps.title: Signal the exception
steps.content: The first sentence gives the usual pattern: in most deer species, males grow antlers and females do not. The next sentence says reindeer are different, so the transition must introduce a contrast or exception.

steps.title: Reject noncontrast transitions
steps.content: A signals similarity, B signals sequence, and D signals a result. None introduces an exception to the general deer pattern. The answer is C.
